title: Mob justice suspected in Thembalethu murder
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Thembalethu Police are...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Thembalethu Police are investigating a case of suspected mob justice after a 30-year-old man was found dead in some bushes in Zone 6 on Saturday 6 September.


> According to reports, the police were called out to the scene at about 16:45 following the assault and found the man with multiple head injuries.


The paramedics declared him dead on the scene.

The police had to use stun grenades to disperse the crowd that had gathered after the attack.

While the motive remains unclear, circumstances suggest the man might have been targeted in a vigilante-style attack.

An autopsy is scheduled to determine the exact cause of death.

Anyone with information that could help identify the perpetrators is urged to contact the Thembalethu Detectives on 079 894 1576.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
